description: Letter fragment addressed "to the esteemed members of the holy community who live in [...]." The paper is almost entirely preserved, but the text is nearly too faded to read. Isolated phrases: "...they changed the traditions of the people of... Hoshaʿna (Rabba?)... the congregation, they excommunicated... Israel... rather it/he [m]oved to Ramla... a Torah scroll...." (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
